name: Milner, Jessy
resolved_employer: President/Owner, Front Line Advisory Group, LLC (Austin program-management consulting firm for municipal/school infrastructure and capital bond projects)
evidence: Jessy Milner of SW Austin/Dripping Springs (78737; addresses 111 Serenity Ct, 121 Victoria Ct) is President and owner of Front Line Advisory Group, an Austin firm doing owner's-rep/program management for city, county and school bond construction programs. Army Special Forces veteran (2002-2006), LSU finance degree. Zip and Austin base corroborate; his firm's public-infrastructure work aligns with gifts to county commissioners (Travillion, Shea, Howard).

name: Baines Johnson, Luci
resolved_employer: Chairman, LBJ Asset Management Partners / LBJ Family Wealth Advisors (family office); co-founder of BusinesSuites; philanthropist
evidence: Luci Baines Johnson, younger daughter of President Lyndon B. Johnson and Lady Bird Johnson; longtime Central Texas resident. Chairs the LBJ family office (LBJ Asset Management Partners / LBJ Family Wealth Advisors) and co-founded BusinesSuites. Downtown Austin address 114 W 7th St Ste 900 (78701) is the LBJ Holding Co. office; 85 heavily-Democratic FEC gifts fit. Gave $10k to Andy Brown.

The Gochman Family Foundation (education/arts/Indigenous studies) is well documented. Palm Beach + philanthropist + Academy career corroborate. Gave $10k to Andy Brown (2021).

name: Winn, Stephen
resolved_employer: Founder & former Chairman/CEO, RealPage (rental/property-management software); now leads Mirasol Capital and chairs Cosm
evidence: Stephen T. Winn, Dallas/Preston Hollow (75229), is the billionaire founder of RealPage — the property-management and rent-pricing software firm (YieldStar) sold to Thoma Bravo in 2021; he now runs investment firm Mirasol Capital and chairs media-tech firm Cosm. In 2023 he and UT-Austin committed ~$200M to environmental research, which corroborates gifts to Travis County's environment-focused commissioners (Shea, Howard). 137 FEC gifts, strongly Republican-leaning.
